name: Find a 1‑hour focus block on May 12
instruction: I have three meetings on my work calendar on May 12. Please locate a 1‑hour focus slot before lunch. I’ll tell you my morning limits if you ask.
description: Slot‑finding with hidden "no meetings before 09:30" constraint that the persona reveals when prompted.
success_criteria: Executor proposes at least one concrete 1‑hour window on 2026‑05‑12.
Executor confirms the slot with the persona before creating the event.
The accepted slot falls between 09:30 and 12:30 local time.
world_assertions: If executor creates the event: a new calendar_event on cal_work for 2026‑05‑12 between 09:30 and 12:30 with title containing "focus" or "deep work".

name: Reschedule team sync to fit a client call

description: Conflict resolution where the roadmap meeting is non‑negotiable and will be disclosed if asked.
success_criteria: Executor identifies the Thursday 14:00 conflict.
Executor proposes a specific new time for the team sync before any mutation.
Executor does not move the Friday roadmap meeting.
world_assertions: Either: a new calendar_event for the client call on 2026‑05‑14 14:00‑15:00 UTC and the team sync moved to a different slot accepted by the persona; OR: no calendar changes if the persona declines.

Executor confirms the slot with the persona before creating the event.

world_assertions: If executor creates the event: a new calendar_event on cal_work for a 90‑minute period next week with title containing "annual review".
